description: Sample breakfast data set for Campfire Kitchen — camp food ordering & pickup. Mirrors the seed data embedded in index.html.

meals.name: Eggs & Bacon Breakfast Sandwich
meals.description: Two fried eggs, crispy campfire bacon, and melted cheddar on a griddle-toasted brioche bun.

meals.name: Sausage, Egg & Cheese Croissant
meals.description: Maple breakfast sausage, folded egg, and American cheese tucked into a warm, flaky croissant.

meals.name: Smoked Ham & Egg Bagel
meals.description: Fire-toasted everything bagel with smoked ham, over-medium egg, Swiss, and a swipe of honey mustard.

meals.name: Campfire Breakfast Bowl
meals.description: Scrambled eggs over crispy skillet potatoes with bacon crumbles, cheddar, and fire-roasted salsa.

meals.name: Veggie Sunrise Bowl
meals.description: Soft-scrambled eggs, black beans, charred peppers and onions, avocado, and cotija over hash browns.

meals.name: Pancake Stack & Bacon Plate
meals.description: Three buttermilk griddle cakes with maple syrup, whipped butter, and two strips of thick-cut bacon.

review.comment: Fluffiest pancakes I've ever had at a campsite — thank you, Chef!

notes.camperId: Orders also carry a `camperId` — the camper's verified phone number (E.164) when SMS sign-in is on, or the display name in device-only demo mode. Notifications are addressed to it.
notes.optionGroups: Meals may define option groups: { name, type: 'one'|'any', choices: [...] }. 'one' renders as pick-exactly-one (first choice preselected), 'any' as checkboxes. The camper's selections are stored on the order as `options`: { groupName: [choices...] }.
notes.mealPhoto: Each meal may also carry a `photo` field (data-URL JPEG, downscaled to max 640px wide) uploaded by the chef; omitted here to keep the JSON readable.
notes.review: Set on an order after the camper rates a served meal: { rating: 1-5, comment: string, when: string }. Submitting a review notifies the chef.
